title: Capital grants plans 2026
body: "The Capital grants plans guidance consists of:   applicant’s guide agreement holder’s guide Terms and Conditions   Use the guidance to apply for Capital grants plans from 5 January 2026.   You must read the applicant’s guide before you apply for these capital items:   PA1: Implementation plan PA2: Feasibility study PA4: Agroforestry plan PA5: Moorland mapping plan PA7: Species management plan   Read the agreement holder’s guide to find out how to manage your agreement and make a claim for payment.   To apply for PA3: Woodland management plan, you must read the PA3: Woodland Management Plan guidance 2026.  You can also apply for other capital grants at any time of the year.  Contact Rural Payments Agency  You can contact RPA by email, phone or post.  Rural Payments Agency PO Box 324 Worksop S95 1DF  Email: ruralpayments@defra.gov.uk  Telephone: 03000 200 301 Monday to Friday, 8:30am to 5pm, except bank holidays Find out about call charges  "
